title: Bonnie Prince Charlie
director: Anthony Kimmins, Leslie Arliss, Alexander Korda
actors: David Niven, Margaret Leighton, Morland Graham
plot: In the Jacobite Rising of 1745, the Young Pretender Bonnie Prince Charlie leads an insurrection to overthrow the Protestant House of Hanover and restore his family, the Catholic branch of the House of Stuart, to the British throne.
